title: Obligations not to be performed at the same place
doc_html:
Art. 1895.  Obligations not to be performed at the same place

Compensation takes place even though the obligations are not to be performed at the same place, but allowance must be made in that case for the expenses of remittance.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
